prompt:
This PR has merge conflicts with main after PRs #32 and #33 were merged. Rebase onto main and resolve all conflicts.

The PR adds Sonarr write tools (trigger_series_search, delete_series, remove_blocklist_item, grab_release). The conflicts are likely in:
- internal/agent/tools.go (tool definitions)
- internal/agent/agent.go (dispatchTool switch cases)  
- internal/sonarr/client.go (Client interface and implementations)
- internal/sonarr/types.go (new types)

After rebasing:
1. Run 'go build ./...' to verify compilation
2. Run 'make test' or 'go test ./...' to verify tests pass
3. Push with 'git push --force-with-lease'
